mapper.sql: select download_id, module_type, biz_id, file_id, download_name, download_type, file_format, generate_status, download_count, last_download_time, expire_time, owner_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_download_record
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_download_record(module_type, biz_id, file_id, download_name, download_type, file_format, generate_status, download_count, last_download_time, expire_time, owner_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{moduleType}, #{bizId}, #{fileId}, #{downloadName}, #{downloadType}, #{fileFormat}, #{generateStatus}, #{downloadCount}, #{lastDownloadTime}, #{expireTime}, #{ownerId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update tdw_download_record set download_count = ifnull(download_count, 0) + 1, last_download_time = now(), update_time = now() where download_id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
update tdw_download_record set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where download_id in
#{id}
